code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test17-MAR-2017Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low serum bicarbonate, and significant proteinuria with glucosuria and mild ketonuria, suggesting impaired renal function with possible tubular involvement. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity, further supporting renal dysfunction. No evidence of urinary tract infection is present. Recommend nephrology evaluation for possible chronic kidney disease and further assessment of underlying etiology.
